data.body:
[Triple Drop Campaign Preview]

Starting 5/2 (Mon), Bounty rewards will be tripled in celebration of the 0.5-Year Anniversary! 
Don't miss out on this opportunity to develop your students' skills!

🗓️Period: 5/2 (Mon) 19:00 – 5/9 (Mon) 18:59 (UTC)
